mapper.insert:
insert into borrow_record
user_id, book_id, due_date,
values
#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{dueDate},
mapper.select: select r.id, r.borrow_no as borrowNo, r.user_id as userId, COALESCE(s.name, t.name) as userName, r.book_id as bookId, b.title as bookTitle, b.isbn as bookIsbn, r.borrow_date as borrowDate, r.due_date as dueDate, r.return_date as returnDate, r.status from borrow_record r left join student s on r.user_id = s.id left join teacher t on r.user_id = t.id left join book b on r.book_id = b.id where r.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_record SET status = '已归还', return_date = CURDATE() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = '借出中'
UPDATE book SET status = '可借', available_copies = available_copies + 1 WHERE id = #{bookId}
mapper.select: SELECT bc.category_name as categoryName, COUNT(*) as borrowCount FROM borrow_record r JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id JOIN book_category bc ON b.category_id = bc.id WHERE 1=1 AND r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.borrow_date >= #{startDate} AND r.borrow_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY bc.category_name ORDER BY borrowCount DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq DAY), '%m-%d') as name, COALESCE(cnt, 0) as value FROM ( SELECT 0 as seq UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 ) days LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), borrow_date) as diff_days, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM borrow_record WHERE borrow_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), borrow_date) ) t ON days.seq = t.diff_days ORDER BY days.seq DESC
